title: Thazhamel Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Thazhamel with a Z-Score of +3.80. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Thazhamel is characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an umidita of 75%. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 11.4 km/h, but it is not providing significant relief from the heat. 
 The CDD is at 12.3 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling, while the HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
